name: Rosey
sentence: Rosey is the daughter of Emma, a serving wench at the Quill and Tankard in Oldtown.

name: Simon Staunton (squire)
sentence: Simon Staunton was a squire from House Staunton during the reign of King Jaehaerys I Targaryen.

name: Sly
sentence: Sly is a female wolf. She is one of Varamyr's pack, each of which he can enter as a warg. She is cunning.

name: Sly (stableboy)
sentence: Sly was a stableboy at Hogs Head, a disreputable inn in Bitterbridge, during the Dance of the Dragons.

name: Tansy (innkeep)
sentence: Tansy is an innkeep at the Peach, a brothel in Stoney Sept.

name: Tansy (orphan)
sentence: Tansy is a girl orphaned by the War of the Five Kings who is currently living at the crossroads inn.

name: Timett (father)
sentence: Timett is the father of Timett of the Burned Men in the Vale of Arryn.

name: Torrhen Stark
sentence: Torrhen Stark, known as the King Who Knelt, was a head of House Stark who reigned as King in the North until Aegon I Targaryen invaded Westeros with his dragons.

name: Tybolt Lannister (king)
sentence: Tybolt Lannister, dubbed the Thunderbolt, was a King of the Rock of House Lannister of Casterly Rock.

name: Vulture King (Aegon II)
sentence: The third Vulture King was a Dornish rebel active during the Dance of the Dragons.

name: Vulture King (Aenys I)
sentence: The Vulture King was a Dornish outlaw who gathered thousands of followers to rise against King Aenys I Targaryen in the Second Dornish War. His given name is unknown.

name: Vulture King (Daeron II)
sentence: The Vulture King was a self-proclaimed king who rose up against the Iron Throne from the Red Mountains of Dorne during the reign of King Daeron II Targaryen.

name: Vulture King (Jaehaerys I)
sentence: The second Vulture King was a self-proclaimed Dornish king who raided in the Third Dornish War during the reign of King Jaehaerys I Targaryen.
